description: Phase 14 - Infrastructure micro-features: Add /metrics endpoint, request-ID propagation, trace-ID in logs, environment config validation, rollback documentation, and SLO burn-rate alert rules. Enhance server-core with metrics and request-id middleware. Add cost dashboard config and canary/SLO Prometheus rules.
steps: 1. Add a /metrics endpoint to packages/server-core/src/plugins/health.ts (Prometheus text format exposition of basic HTTP metrics: request count, latency histogram, active connections). Export a metricsPlugin alongside the health plugin.

2. Add request-ID propagation middleware in packages/server-core/src/plugins/request-id.ts - extract X-Request-ID from incoming headers (or use Fastify genReqId), set it on reply headers, and attach to Pino logger context so all logs include request_id and trace_id fields.
3. Register the new request-id and metrics plugins in packages/server-core/src/app.ts.

4. Add Prometheus SLO burn-rate alert rules to infra/prometheus/alerts/slo-burn-rate.yml with multi-window alerting (14.4x burn for 1h/5m, 6x burn for 6h/30m, 3x burn for 24h/1h windows) for each service.
5. Add a cost dashboard JSON at infra/grafana/dashboards/cost.json covering AI provider spend, infrastructure cost estimates, and request volume/cost ratios.
6. Add a canary analysis Prometheus rule set in infra/prometheus/alerts/canary.yml that compares error rates between canary and stable pods.
7. Add infra/docs/rollback-plan.md documenting the rollback procedure for both Helm and database migrations.
8. Add infra/docs/environment-config.md documenting environment variable management across staging/production.
9. Add tests for the new request-id plugin and metrics plugin in packages/server-core/src/__tests__/request-id.test.ts and packages/server-core/src/__tests__/metrics.test.ts.
10. Ensure pnpm typecheck and pnpm test pass for packages/server-core.
acceptance_criteria: packages/server-core exports a metricsPlugin and requestIdPlugin
The app.ts registers both new plugins
GET /metrics returns text/plain with prometheus-format metrics (http_requests_total, http_request_duration_seconds)
Log entries include request_id and trace_id fields
infra/prometheus/alerts/slo-burn-rate.yml contains valid Prometheus alerting rules
infra/grafana/dashboards/cost.json is valid Grafana dashboard JSON
infra/docs/rollback-plan.md and infra/docs/environment-config.md exist with substantive content
findings: All gates passing: typecheck 72/72 tasks, test 75/75 tasks. Prettier formatted files during pre-commit hook. Commit header limited to 100 chars by commitlint.
